'''DZ 17X Nemesis''' was an extremely rare [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] battle armor model manufactured by [[Mili-Corp/Legends|Mili-Corp]]. It was commonly found in the day of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] but around the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the number of intact Nemesis units was very small.

==Specifications==
The armor provided full body protection against kinetic and energy attacks and came with an inbuilt [[Multi-Frequency Targeting and Acquisition System/Legends|Multi-Frequency Targeting and Acquisition System]] and a 180 degree [[Macrobinoculars/Legends|macrobinocular]] vision providing sensor system. A [[DEMP gun/Legends|DEMP gun]] was installed in the left forearm armor and a light [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] on the right one. A climate-controlled [[Body glove/Legends|body glove]] was also standard equipment.

==History==
The Nemesis armor was designed with corporate militias and security forces in mind. While common prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], most Nemesis units were destroyed in the many conflicts leading up to the end of the Old Republic. Around the time of the Galactic Civil War, it was believed that there were only six intact and fully operational Nemesis powersuits around. Among the known owners of a Nemesis were [[Forig Thull]] and [[Fycor]].
